speakers.name: Vikas Jadhav
speakers.summary: Vikas Jadhav opened the earnings call by introducing the key management team and setting the agenda for the session. He highlighted the possibility of forward-looking statements and the inherent risks and uncertainties associated with them. His tone was neutral, focusing on procedural aspects of the call.

speakers.name: Venu Lambu
speakers.summary: Venu Lambu, in his first quarter as CEO, expressed confidence in LTIMindtree's strategic direction and performance. He highlighted significant revenue growth and strategic wins, including a major deal with a global agribusiness leader. Venu emphasized the company's pivot towards AI and the launch of the BlueVerse ecosystem. He answered questions about client growth and large deal traction directly but avoided giving full-year guidance, citing market uncertainties.

speakers.name: Vipul Chandra
speakers.summary: Vipul Chandra provided a detailed overview of LTIMindtree's financial performance, highlighting revenue growth and improved EBIT margins. He discussed the increase in profit after tax and the effective tax rate. Vipul confidently addressed questions regarding specific vertical margins and SG&A expenses, providing clear financial insights.

speakers.name: Nachiket Deshpande
speakers.role: President, Global AI Services, Strategic Deals & Partnerships
speakers.summary: Nachiket Deshpande expressed optimism about the momentum in large deals and strategic partnerships. He highlighted the increased activity and structured approach in handling large deals, which has improved the company's win rate. Nachiket directly addressed questions about the large deal pipeline, reinforcing the company's strategic focus on expanding its market presence.

speakers.name: Moderator
speakers.summary: The moderator facilitated the earnings call, ensuring a smooth transition between speakers and managing the Q&A session. The tone was neutral, focusing on procedural aspects and ensuring participants were aware of the call's structure and recording.

chain_of_thought: The analysis involved identifying each speaker's role and extracting key statements from the transcript. The tone was assessed based on the language and context of their statements. Management speakers were evaluated on their responses to analyst questions, noting any direct answers or evasions. A narrative summary was crafted for each speaker, capturing their contributions and key messages during the call.
